goal: Metal additive manufactured (SLM/DMLS titanium or stainless steel) rectangular lattice panel approximately 120x70x8mm overall, comprising a solid flat perimeter frame with 2mm wall thickness and approximately 3mm height base plate, filled with a repeating triply-periodic-inspired woven coil lattice infill pattern consisting of interlocking circular arc strut elements approximately 10mm cell pitch arranged in a 10-column by 6-row array, where each unit cell contains two orthogonal sinusoidal/circular coil strands of approximately 1.5mm strut diameter that weave over and under one another in an alternating over-under interlaced topology creating open through-holes between the crossings, the entire structure having a total height of approximately 8mm with the lattice rising 5mm above the base frame floor, as-built surface finish with visible powder fusion texture, no threads or additional fastener features.
